name: polestar-mcp-server
description: MCP Server for Polestar 2 — battery, charging, odometer, health (unofficial, reverse-engineered API)

tools.name: polestar_get_status
tools.description: Get current vehicle status: battery level, charging state, range, and odometer.

tools.name: polestar_get_vehicle_info
tools.description: Get static vehicle info: model, year, VIN, battery specs, software version.

tools.name: polestar_get_health
tools.description: Get vehicle health: fluid levels, service warnings, next service date.

polestar_vin.description: Default Vehicle Identification Number (optional if only one car)
